feature.name: Typed environment variable parsing
feature.description: Extract environs Env typed parsers with marshmallow field deserialization, custom validators, list/dict subcasts, expand_vars, prefix, and deferred seal validation without importing environs or python-dotenv.
included_behaviors: typed casting for int, bool, str with defaults and eager errors
marshmallow validate= callables and validators on parsed fields
list and dict env strings with delimiter/subcast preprocessing
constructor and context-manager prefix for env key names
deferred validation via eager=False and seal() error aggregation
custom timedelta duration strings via fields.TimeDelta
excluded_behaviors: read_env dotenv file loading and FileAwareEnv file indirection
module-level env singleton, upstream tests, docs, and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: Env couples os.environ access, optional expand_vars proxy resolution, marshmallow field factories, preprocess hooks for composite types, and deferred error aggregation across env, fields, types, and exceptions modules.
signals: _field2method wires marshmallow Field.deserialize with validate kwargs
_preprocess_list and _preprocess_dict split env strings before subcast fields
eager=False accumulates ValidationError messages until seal()
fields.TimeDelta adds GEP-2257 and ISO-8601 duration parsing beyond marshmallow

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Env, EnvError, EnvValidationError, EnvSealedError, ParserConflictError, ValidationError, validate
